title: gnaphalium itinerarii
intro: Gnaphalium itinerarii, also known as Travelers Buttonweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its chemical compounds, including sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gnaphalium itinerarii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions.
